preferred_label_jp: 社会主義圏／社会主義陣営
scope_note: Broad collective category for socialist states when the source treats them as a political or diplomatic camp. May include the USSR, Eastern Europe, the PRC, and other socialist states depending on source usage.
use_when: Use when the source explicitly says 社会主義諸国, 社会主義圏, 社会主義陣営, 共産圏諸国, or otherwise treats socialist states as a collective actor.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because one or more socialist states appear individually. Do not infer it from USSR, PRC, or Eastern European country names alone.
aliases_original_terms: 社会主義諸国;社会主義圏;社会主義陣営;共産圏諸国;socialist countries;socialist camp;communist countries
notes: Preferred general bloc ID for explicit collective socialist/camp wording. Preserve the exact original wording in original_terms.

scope_note: USSR-led political and strategic bloc centered on Eastern Europe.
use_when: Use when the source explicitly treats the USSR and Eastern European states as an integrated political bloc, Eastern bloc, Soviet bloc, or 東側陣営.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Eastern Europe as geography. Do not automatically include the PRC. Use EASTERN_EUROPE in region_ids for geographic references.
aliases_original_terms: 東側陣営;東欧圏;ソ連圏;ソ連ブロック;Eastern bloc;Soviet bloc
example_applications: Use only where collective USSR-East European alignment is explicit; not for files merely listing USSR and Eastern European countries.
notes: PRC is normally outside this bloc ID unless the historical source itself groups it together.

scope_note: US-led Western political, strategic, and diplomatic camp.
use_when: Use when the source explicitly says 西側諸国, 西側陣営, 自由主義陣営, or treats Western states as a collective political actor.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Western Europe as geography or merely because the USA, UK, France, or other Western states appear individually.
aliases_original_terms: 西側諸国;西側陣営;自由主義陣営;Western bloc;Western camp
example_applications: Potential use in records explicitly contrasting 東西両陣営 or Western and socialist camps.
notes: NATO is an organization and should remain in organization_ids; WESTERN_BLOC expresses the broader camp.

preferred_label_jp: 非同盟運動／非同盟諸国
scope_note: Formal or clearly identified collective diplomacy of non-aligned states.
use_when: Use for 非同盟諸国首脳会議, 非同盟運動, NAM, or records explicitly treating non-aligned states as a coordinated diplomatic group.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because states are commonly described by historians as non-aligned, or because a neutral mediation proposal appears.
aliases_original_terms: 非同盟運動;非同盟諸国;非同盟諸国首脳会議;NAM;Non-Aligned Movement;non-aligned countries;Non-Aligned;non-aligned states;非同盟
example_applications: 2013-2435: Third Non-Aligned Countries Summit, if confirmed in the record.
notes: Use only where the non-aligned identity is explicit. Neutral states or mediation groups are not automatically NAM. Canonical ID is NON_ALIGNED_MOVEMENT; NON_ALIGNED may be treated as a search alias, not a separate bloc_id.

preferred_label_jp: アジア・アフリカ諸国グループ／AAブロック
scope_note: Asian and African states acting collectively as a diplomatic, voting, or negotiating group.
use_when: Use when the source explicitly describes アジア・アフリカ諸国, AA諸国, or an Afro-Asian group as a coordinated collective actor, common position, voting bloc, or negotiating group.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because a record concerns both Asia and Africa, Bandung, AAPSO, or letters sent to Asian and African leaders.
aliases_original_terms: AA諸国;アジア・アフリカ諸国グループ;アジア・アフリカ・ブロック;Afro-Asian bloc;Afro-Asian group
example_applications: Possible in UN voting/negotiating records where AA states are explicitly treated as a common bloc; not automatic for Bandung records.
notes: Keep AFRO_ASIA in region_ids for geographic/diplomatic space; use this bloc only for coordinated collective action. Distinguish from region_id AFRO_ASIA and organization_id AAPSO.

scope_note: Developing-country negotiating coalition in the UN system, especially UNCTAD and economic-development diplomacy.
use_when: Use when G77, Group of 77, 77か国グループ, or 77カ国（開発途上国）グループ is explicitly identified.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for developing countries generally when no G77 identity or collective action is stated.
aliases_original_terms: G77;Group of 77;77か国グループ;77カ国（開発途上国）グループ;開発途上国77か国グループ
notes: Can be stored in bloc_ids even though it is also a durable coalition; avoid duplicating in organization_ids unless the schema intentionally permits both.

preferred_label_jp: UNCTAD・Bグループ（先進国グループ）
scope_note: Developed-country negotiating group used in UNCTAD conference diplomacy.
use_when: Use when Bグループ, Group B, or 先進国グループ is explicitly used in an UNCTAD or related negotiating context.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for developed countries generally outside an explicit Group B context.
aliases_original_terms: Bグループ;B（先進国）グループ;Group B;developed countries group
notes: Conference-specific negotiating group, not synonymous with WESTERN_BLOC.

scope_note: African states acting collectively as a formal or clearly coordinated regional group in the UN, UNCTAD, or another multilateral forum.
use_when: Use when the source explicitly says アフリカ・グループ, African Group, common African position, or documents a coordinated African negotiating/voting group.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely for アフリカ諸国, an African-states luncheon, or a list of African country reactions without collective coordination.
aliases_original_terms: アフリカ・グループ;アフリカ諸国グループ;African Group;African states group
example_applications: 2011-0193: アフリカ各グループ会合, if the meeting is explicitly a negotiating group.
notes: Conditional because Japanese archival wording may use アフリカ諸国 loosely; verify collective institutional action.

scope_note: Asian states acting collectively as a formal or clearly coordinated regional group in a multilateral forum.
use_when: Use when the source explicitly says アジア・グループ, Asian Group, common Asian position, or documents a coordinated Asian negotiating/voting group.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely for アジア諸国, regional coverage, or a list of Asian country reactions.
aliases_original_terms: アジア・グループ;アジア諸国グループ;Asian Group;Asian states group
example_applications: 2011-0193: アジア・グループ会合.
notes: Use ASIA in region_ids for geography; this bloc ID requires collective negotiating or voting action.

scope_note: Arab states treated collectively as a diplomatic, voting, or negotiating group.
use_when: Use when the source explicitly treats アラブ諸国 as a common diplomatic group, joint position, voting group, or collective interlocutor.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Middle East geography, individual Arab countries, the United Arab Republic as a single entity, or merely because the Arab League appears.
aliases_original_terms: アラブ諸国;アラブ諸国グループ;Arab states;Arab group;Arab bloc
example_applications: Potential in records explicitly documenting collective Arab-state diplomacy; an アラブ諸国招待ランチ alone is insufficient.
notes: ARAB_WORLD is better treated as a cultural-geographic concept, not as this bloc. LAS remains an organization. Use only for explicit collective Arab-state diplomacy; keep ARAB_WORLD outside bloc_ids unless the source frames it as a diplomatic group.

scope_note: Historical Cold War category used by contemporary sources for non-communist or Western-aligned states.
use_when: Use only when the source itself uses 自由世界, 自由圏, free world, or an equivalent historical category.
do_not_use_when: Do not apply as a modern analytical label and do not infer it from pro-Western alignment.
aliases_original_terms: 自由世界;自由圏;自由主義世界;free world
example_applications: Useful for archival titles or foreign-policy overviews employing Cold War ideological terminology.
notes: Preserve source language because this is a historically loaded category.

scope_note: Source-defined category for Asian states placed in the 'free world' camp.
use_when: Use only where アジア自由圏 or Asian free world appears explicitly in the source or table of contents.
do_not_use_when: Do not infer from Asian allies of the USA or non-communist Asian states.
aliases_original_terms: アジア自由圏;Asian Free World;Free Asia
example_applications: New Zealand foreign-policy overview record with an explicit アジア自由圏 section.
notes: Keep separate from ASIA as geography and WESTERN_BLOC as the general political camp.

scope_note: Source-defined category for Asian communist states treated collectively.
use_when: Use only where アジア共産圏, Asian communist bloc, or an equivalent source term appears explicitly.
do_not_use_when: Do not infer merely from PRC, North Korea, North Vietnam, or other communist states appearing together.
aliases_original_terms: アジア共産圏;Asian Communist Bloc;communist Asia
example_applications: New Zealand foreign-policy overview record with an explicit アジア共産圏 section.
notes: This is a source-language bloc category, not a default analytical classification.
